name: AgentWeb MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing access to a database of 11 million+ businesses across 195 countries. Enables AI agents to search for businesses by name, industry, location, and other criteria — supporting B2B lead generation, market research, competitive intelligence, and business data enrichment workflows.
use_cases: Searching for businesses by industry and location for B2B lead generation agents
Researching market players and competitors in specific geographic regions
Enriching CRM data with business information from prospecting agents
Building target account lists for sales and marketing automation agents
not_for: Consumer (B2C) contact lookups (focus is business data)
Real-time business status verification (data freshness varies)
Teams with GDPR concerns about bulk business data processing
best_when: A sales or market research team wants AI agents to discover and research businesses across global markets — enabling geographic and industry-specific business intelligence without manual searching.
avoid_when: You need verified, real-time business data with high accuracy guarantees. Also review data freshness and coverage for your specific geographic markets.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Registration required to obtain API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier available with limited queries; paid tiers for higher volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for higher query volumes and advanced filters
pricing.notes: Freemium model. Check current pricing and data freshness before committing to use.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply by API tier

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Business data from 195 countries — verify GDPR and local data protection compliance
Data freshness and accuracy varies by region — verify critical data independently
11M+ businesses claim needs verification — coverage quality differs by geography
Community tool with limited track record — validate data quality before production use
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business contact data may be regulated under GDPR, CCPA, and local laws. Verify compliance requirements for your use case and target geographies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business data privacy compliance required (GDPR, CCPA). Verify data provenance and consent model.
